cau_hoi: Jose had a hard time comparing the iPhone to the Samsung phone because to him they were apples and oranges.
giai_thich: apples and oranges: hoàn toàn khác nhau, khác một trời một vực.

cau_hoi: Peter is the black sheep of the family, so he is never welcomed there.
giai_thich: the black sheep: thành viên cá biệt, người bị coi là tồi tệ và đáng xấu hổ trong nhóm/gia đình.

cau_hoi: There's a list of repairs as long as ................ .
giai_thich: as long as your arm: rất dài (danh sách, văn bản...).

cau_hoi: I tried to talk to her but she was as high as a ................ .
giai_thich: as high as a kite: quá phấn khích (do ảnh hưởng của chất kích thích hoặc cồn).

cau_hoi: We're over the ................! Who wouldn't be? We've just won £1 million!
giai_thich: over the moon: cực kỳ vui sướng, hạnh phúc.

cau_hoi: I've never really enjoyed going to the ballet or the opera; they're not really my ................ .
giai_thich: not one's cup of tea: không phải sở trường hoặc thứ ai đó yêu thích.

cau_hoi: You never really know where you are with her as she just blows hot and cold.
giai_thich: blow hot and cold: hay thay đổi ý kiến, tâm trạng dao động.

cau_hoi: "Edwards seems like a dog with two tails this morning." – "Haven't you hear the news? His wife gave birth a baby boy early this morning."
giai_thich: like a dog with two tails: rất vui vẻ, hạnh phúc.

cau_hoi: Thomas knows Paris like the back of his ................ . He used to be a taxi driver there for 2 years.
giai_thich: know sth like the back of one's hand: biết rõ cái gì như lòng bàn tay.

cau_hoi: Josh may get into hot water when driving at full speed after drinking.
giai_thich: get into hot water: gặp rắc rối, gặp khó khăn.

cau_hoi: You have to be on your toes if you want to beat her.
A: pay all your attention to what you are doing
B: upset her in what she is doing
C: get involved in what she is doing
D: make her comply with your orders
giai_thich: be on your toes: chú ý, cảnh giác, tập trung vào việc đang làm.

cau_hoi: By appearing on the soap powder commercials she became a ................ name.
giai_thich: a household name: một cái tên quen thuộc, nổi tiếng với mọi nhà.

cau_hoi: When his parents are away, his oldest brother ................ .
giai_thich: call the shots: chỉ huy, quyết định các công việc cần làm.

cau_hoi: Hearing about people who mistreat animals makes me go hot under the ................ .
giai_thich: hot under the collar: điên tiết, cáu tiết.

cau_hoi: I know you are upset about breaking up with Tom, but there are plenty more ................ .
giai_thich: plenty more fish in the sea: còn rất nhiều lựa chọn khác (thường dùng trong tình cảm).

cau_hoi: I'll have to go to the funeral of Ms. Jane, a ................ of mine.
giai_thich: flesh and blood: người có máu mủ ruột thịt.

cau_hoi: When the kids asked him about his girlfriend he'd go as red as a ................
giai_thich: as red as a beetroot: đỏ mặt (vì ngượng ngùng).

cau_hoi: 'What I've got to say to you now is strictly ................ the record and most certainly not for publication,' said the government official to the reporter.
giai_thich: off the record: không chính thức, không được công bố công khai.

cau_hoi: I can't give you the answer on the ................; I'll have to think about it for a few days.
giai_thich: on the spot: ngay lập tức.

cau_hoi: Someone is going to have to take responsibility for this disaster. Who is going to ................?
giai_thich: carry the can: chịu trách nhiệm, chịu sự chỉ trích cho việc gì.

cau_hoi: I am sure your sister will lend you a sympathetic ................ when you explain the situation to her.
giai_thich: lend an ear: lắng nghe một cách chân thành, đồng cảm.

cau_hoi: Unfortunately, the injury may keep him out of football ................ . He may never play again.
giai_thich: for good: mãi mãi, vĩnh viễn.

cau_hoi: The children were full of beans today looking forward to their field trip.
giai_thich: full of beans: sôi nổi, hăng hái, tràn đầy năng lượng.

cau_hoi: John: "Oh, I forgot my girlfriend's birthday last week." - Anne: " ............ "
B: So I guess you are in the doghouse again.
D: You really should get a life.
giai_thich: be in the doghouse: bị ai đó giận dỗi, khó chịu vì lỗi lầm mình đã gây ra.

cau_hoi: Sometimes in a bad situation, there may still be some good things. Try not to "throw out the ................ with the bathwater".
giai_thich: throw the baby out with the bathwater: vứt bỏ những thứ giá trị cùng với những thứ không cần thiết.

cau_hoi: Wendy is on the horns of a dilemma: she just wonders whether to go for a picnic with her friends or to stay at home with her family.
D: unready to make up her mind
giai_thich: on the horns of a dilemma: tiến thoái lưỡng nan, phân vân chưa quyết định được.

cau_hoi: At every faculty meeting Ms. Volatie always manages to put her foot in her mouth.
giai_thich: put one's foot in one's mouth: nói điều gì đó sai lầm hoặc gây xấu hổ.

cau_hoi: If you are at a loose end this weekend I will show you around the city.
giai_thich: at a loose end: rảnh rỗi, không có việc gì làm.

cau_hoi: Thanks to her regular workouts and sensible diet she certainly strikes me as in the pink.
giai_thich: in the pink: có sức khỏe tốt.

cau_hoi: He was such a wet blanket at the party tonight!
A: He made people at the party wet through.
B: He spoiled other people's pleasure at the party.
C: He bought a wet blanket to the party.
D: He was wet through when going home from the party.
giai_thich: wet blanket: người phá đám, làm hỏng niềm vui của người khác.

cau_hoi: That the genetic differences make one race superior to another is nothing but a tall story.
giai_thich: a tall story: chuyện khó tin, chuyện hoang đường.

cau_hoi: You should accept the Nokia mobile phone as a 16-birthday present from your parents delightedly. Don't ................ .
A: look gift horse in the mouth
giai_thich: don't look a gift horse in the mouth: đừng soi xét, đòi hỏi giá trị khi nhận quà.

cau_hoi: Failing to submit the proposal on time was ................ for Tom.
A: a real kick in the pants
giai_thich: a nail in the coffin: giọt nước tràn ly, điều dẫn đến sự thất bại/kết thúc.

cau_hoi: At first, no one believed she was a pilot, but her documents ................ colour to her statements.
giai_thich: lend colour to st: chứng minh, làm cho điều gì thêm thuyết phục.

cau_hoi: Mr. Simpkins is the big ................ in the company as he has just been promoted to the position of Managing Director.
giai_thich: a big cheese: nhân vật quan trọng, tai to mặt lớn.

cau_hoi: Shake a leg or you will miss the train.
giai_thich: shake a leg: nhanh lên.

cau_hoi: I'm going on business for a week, so I'll be leaving everything ................ .
giai_thich: in one's capable hands: trong quyền giải quyết, dưới sự đảm đương của ai đó đáng tin.

cau_hoi: My father hit the roof when he found that I'd damaged the car.
giai_thich: hit the roof: cực kỳ giận dữ.

cau_hoi: I refuse to believe a word of it; it's a cock-and-................ story.
giai_thich: a cock-and-bull story: chuyện bịa đặt, vẽ vời.

cau_hoi: William was as ................ as a cucumber when the harsh punishment was meted out to him by the judge.
giai_thich: as cool as a cucumber: bình tĩnh, không nao núng.

cau_hoi: One way to let off ................ after a stressful day is to take some vigorous exercise.
giai_thich: let off steam: xả hơi, giải tỏa căng thẳng.

cau_hoi: I wish you'd do the accounts. I don't have ................ for numbers.
giai_thich: have a head for st: có năng khiếu, giỏi về cái gì.

cau_hoi: He sent his children to the park so that he could have some ................ .
giai_thich: peace and quiet: sự bình yên và tĩnh lặng.

cau_hoi: I think the main problem in this area is the lack of a good bus service. - You're right. You've hit the ................ on the head.
giai_thich: hit the nail on the head: nói đúng trọng tâm, nói chính xác.
